opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Her head is covered in bugs and she has scratched herself until she's bleeding. None of us have slept a wink for two nights.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Visible head lice with relentless itching and bleeding scratches; no one is sleeping.

symptom_narrative.onset: 'something moving' in the hair 5 days ago, intense itch over 48h
symptom_narrative.character: intense scalp itching with visible crawling lice and eggs on the hairs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: relentless itch, violent scratching, bleeding, no sleep
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: scalp, worst behind the ears and nape of neck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: bleeding scratches with some crusting; irritable; no fever

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: nothing tried yet for the lice

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: crowded sleeping arrangements; high household transmission risk

communication_style.typical_message_style: mother distressed and exhausted, providing history

objective_data_offered.value: white eggs stuck firmly to hairs behind the ears and at the nape, with visible live crawling lice; scratched raw areas on the scalp and back of neck with some yellowish crust
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: mother's description/camera; cannot palpate lymph nodes or assess deep infection
